title: Fissistigma uhrii

intro: Fissistigma uhrii, also known as Uhri's fissistigma, is a plant species within the Annonaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various diseases such as cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular disorders.
